title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (20) لسنة 1979 بشأن قواعد التسجيل والسلامة الخاصة بالسفن الصغيرة
title_en: Decree No. (13) of 1979 amending Article Two of Legislative Decree No. 20 of 1977 amending some provisions of the Law regulating the Pensions and Retirement Gratuities for officers and Personnel of the Bahrain Defence Force and Public Security, promulgated by Legislative Decree No. 11 of 1976
